macro_summary: May 22 brings a packed macro calendar including Jobless Claims, Philly Fed, Housing Starts, and Preliminary PMI data, creating a mixed risk environment with NVDA's blowout post-earnings move dominating tech sentiment but slight dip on China supply concerns. | Markets showing mixed signals as industrial and AI-infrastructure names remain near multi-month highs on strong earnings beats, while rising Treasury yields and lingering inflation concerns weigh on high-beta and growth names. | Live web search unavailable due to persistent timeouts; macro context unconfirmed for today, resulting in mixed/uncertain market sentiment across all symbols.
